'''Jurnel Arrant''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], serving as a the [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] of [[Lommite Limited]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. Secretly, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] manipulated events to put Lommite Limited out of business and allow the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to take their mines.

{{Char-stub}}
